creator: dev@submerge.ch
text:
Created attachment 233251
Update audio/jack-example-tools to release 2.

This updates audio/jack-example-tools to recent release number 2 (no semantic versioning with major / minor). There's no big changes, just bug fixes.

I gave it a test drive on FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE, mainly jack_midi_latency_test which has received some fixes.

I'm the maintainer, BTW.
